    Sync from Slack: #mm-csm-merchant-moms

    How to get the latest sync JSON:

    PPC — Product Pipeline Overview
    Product Total WIP Sent to Bank Closed Lost Closed Won Target Achievement %
    < 70% — Red 70 – 90% — Amber > 90% — Green · Achievement % = Closed Won ÷ Target

    🔔 Slack AMB Drop Alerts

    Get notified when a merchant's AMB falls >10% from a base above 0.30 cr

    Create an Incoming Webhook in your Slack workspace → App Directory → Incoming Webhooks

    Slack → click your name → Profile → ⋯ More → Copy member ID

    When triggered: Each time you upload a new CSV to AMB Portfolio, the dashboard compares it to the previous data. If any merchant's AMB drops by more than 10% from a previous AMB above 0.30 cr, an alert is posted to your configured Slack channel.

    ✨ Claude AI Text Improvement

    Enter your Anthropic API key to enable real AI grammar improvement

    How it works: When you click ✨ Improve Text in any pipeline form, Claude will rewrite your text with correct grammar, clear sentences, and professional tone. Without a key, the built-in local improvement runs instead.
